title: AbiliSwords
body: AbiliSwords Is A Mod With Multiple Customized Swords That Change How You Can Battle. Now What Do The Swords Do? Poison Sword: -On Hit Poisons Enemy For 5 Seconds Blindness Sword: -On Hit Blinds Enemy For 5 Seconds Speed Sword: -On Right Click Gives Speed 2 For 5 Seconds. ***(Crafting Recipe In Gallery)*** Looking For A Minecraft Server For You And Your Friends? Well Shockbyte Has You Covered. Sign Up With My Affiliate Link To Help Support Me!
